title: Piston Shrinking
description:
Make you and mobs small with pistons!
(0.75x, 0.5x, 0.25x, 0.01x size)
body:
# Shrink Datapack by Pious

With this Datapack you can shrink **yourself** and **mobs** with pistons.
To **shrink** you need to stand under a **piston** and extend it.
To **grow** you need to stand under a **sticky** **piston** and retract it.
- Stand under a slab which is one block above you and extend the piston to shrink to 0.75 size.
- Extend the piston to shrink to 0.5 size.
- Stand under a slab and extend the piston to shrink to 0.25 size.
- Stand under a cauldron while you are 0.25 size and extend the piston to shrink to 0.01 size.


Have Fun :D
